ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Patent number assigned by the patent office */,
  "patent_priority_year" INTEGER /* Year the patent application was first filed */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent application (e.g., pending, granted, abandoned) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the patent application was filed */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was granted */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the patent */,
  "claims" TEXT /* Claims section of the patent */,
  "patent_type" TEXT /* Type of patent (e.g., utility, design, plant) */,
  "technical_field" TEXT /* Technical field of the patent */,
  "cpc_classifications" TEXT /* CPC (Cooperative Patent Classification) classifications */,
  "ipc_classifications" TEXT /* IPC (International Patent Classification) classifications */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the full patent document */,
  "parent_patent_id" INTEGER /* Parent patent ID to track continuations, divisionals, and continuations-in-part */,
  "current_owner_id" TEXT /* Current owner ID to track patent ownership changes */,
  "prosecution_status" TEXT /* Patent's status in the prosecution process (e.g., pending, granted, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventors" (
  "inventor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each inventor */,
  "inventor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inventor */,
  "inventor_street" TEXT /* Street address of the inventor */,
  "inventor_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the inventor's address */,
  "inventor_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the inventor's address */,
  "inventor_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the inventor (e.g., university, company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_inventors" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent-inventor relationship */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "inventor_id" TEXT /* ID of the inventor */,
  "inventor_order" INTEGER /* Order of the inventor in the patent application */,
  "inventor_role" TEXT /* Role of the inventor in the patent (e.g., primary inventor, co-inventor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_inventors_inventor_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventor_id") REFERENCES inventors ("inventor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_inventors_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquirers" (
  "acquirer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each acquirer */,
  "acquirer_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_state_code" TEXT /* State code of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_region" TEXT /* Region of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_city" TEXT /* City of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_website" TEXT /* Website of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_parent_company" TEXT /* Parent company of the acquirer */,
  "acquirer_industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector of the acquirer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquirer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_acquirers" (
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent-acquirer relationship */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "acquirer_id" TEXT /* ID of the acquirer */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., purchase, license, assignment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_acquirers_acquirer_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquirer_id") REFERENCES acquirers ("acquirer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_acquirers_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "country_language" TEXT /* Language of the country */,
  "country_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the city */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "city_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "city_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "city_metropolitan_area" TEXT /* Metropolitan area of the city */,
  "city_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., application, grant, maintenance fee) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_documents_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent relationship */,
  "parent_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent patent */,
  "child_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child patent */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., continuation, divisional, continuation-in-part) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_relations_child_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_relations_parent_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_examiners" (
  "examiner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each examiner */,
  "examiner_name" TEXT /* Name of the examiner */,
  "examiner_office" TEXT /* Office of the examiner */,
  "examiner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the examiner */,
  "examiner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the examiner */,
  "examiner_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the examiner */,
  "examiner_experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the examiner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examiner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_examiner_relationships" (
  "per_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent-examiner relationship */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "examiner_id" TEXT /* ID of the examiner */,
  "examiner_start_date" TEXT /* Date the examiner started working on the patent */,
  "examiner_end_date" TEXT /* Date the examiner finished working on the patent */,
  "examiner_role" TEXT /* Role of the examiner in the patent examination process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("per_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_examiner_relationships_examiner_id FOREIGN KEY ("examiner_id") REFERENCES patent_examiners ("examiner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_examiner_relationships_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citing_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent making the citation */,
  "cited_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited patent */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of the citation (e.g., prior art, reference) */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_citations_citing_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_citations_cited_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_legal_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal event */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the legal event (e.g., assignment, rejection, dispute) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_legal_events_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_maintenance_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance fee */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the maintenance fee */,
  "fee_due_date" TEXT /* Date the fee was due */,
  "fee_payment_date" TEXT /* Date the fee was paid */,
  "fee_status" TEXT /* Status of the fee payment (e.g., paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_maintenance_fees_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "assignor_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignor */,
  "assignee_id" TEXT /* ID of the assignee */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., full, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_assignments_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_assignments_assignor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignor_id") REFERENCES inventors ("inventor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_assignments_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES acquirers ("acquirer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle stage */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the patent lifecycle (e.g., application, examination, grant) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stage (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_lifecycle_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "publication_number" TEXT /* Publication number */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was issued */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of the publication (e.g., application, grant) */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_publications_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_prior_art" (
  "prior_art_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prior art reference */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "prior_art_type" TEXT /* Type of the prior art (e.g., patent, publication, other) */,
  "prior_art_number" TEXT /* Number or identifier of the prior art */,
  "prior_art_title" TEXT /* Title of the prior art */,
  "prior_art_date" TEXT /* Date of the prior art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prior_art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_prior_art_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "claim_number" INTEGER /* Number of the claim */,
  "claim_text" TEXT /* Text of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of the claim (e.g., independent, dependent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_claims_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the patent */,
  "keyword_weightage" REAL /* Weightage or relevance of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_keywords_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of the classification (e.g., CPC, IPC) */,
  "classification_code" TEXT /* Classification code */,
  "classification_system" TEXT /* Classification system (e.g., CPC, IPC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_classifications_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)
